human_actions_pending.context: Code implemented but not tested in browser. OO restarted, needs Ctrl+Shift+R.

decisions.rationale: PasteHtml is async, can't run in callCommand. ToJSON is synchronous and lossless.
Manual property enumeration misses images and requires maintenance on OO updates.

decisions.decision: Fallback to Clone path when no snapshot
decisions.rationale: Graceful degradation, marked as legacy to remove later.

next_action: Manual test: Ctrl+Shift+R in browser, run 5 test scenarios (formatted table, modified table, insert, inline regression, plain text)
context_notes: Plan v3.0-03-04 went through 3 approach iterations (structured JSON → HTML/PasteHtml → ToJSON/FromJSON). Double Api.FromJSON per table is a known minor concern. Research in table-snapshot-research.md.
